name: Maya Action: Playblast
description: Creates a Maya action to render a playblast (viewport capture) of the current scene. Note: playblast in Maya headless/batch mode has limitations and may require a display. Chain multiple action nodes together via actions_in/actions_out, then feed the final actions_out into a Maya Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    output_path = inputs.get('output_path') or self.get_parameter('output_path', '')
    frame_start = inputs.get('frame_start')
    if frame_start is None:
        frame_start = self.get_parameter('frame_start', 1)
    frame_end = inputs.get('frame_end')
    if frame_end is None:
        frame_end = self.get_parameter('frame_end', 100)
    width = inputs.get('width')
    if width is None:
        width = self.get_parameter('width', 1920)
    height = inputs.get('height')
    if height is None:
        height = self.get_parameter('height', 1080)
    fmt = inputs.get('format') or self.get_parameter('format', 'qt')

    action = {
        'type': 'playblast',
        'output_path': output_path,
        'frame_start': int(frame_start),
        'frame_end': int(frame_end),
        'width': int(width),
        'height': int(height),
        'format': fmt
    }

    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added playblast action -> {output_path} (frames {frame_start}-{frame_end}, {width}x{height})')

    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
